titleEn: Peru is set to break the all-time record for fresh pomegranate exports in 2026
contentHtml: Peru exported 49.4 million kilos of fresh pomegranates from January 1 to June 13, 2026, a 36.03% increase compared to 36.3 million kilos exported during the same period in 2025, as reported by Fernando Cillóniz Benavides, president of the consultancy firm Inform@cción. Cillóniz Benavides highlighted that…
